sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_edges (resolution UInt8, edge_length Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO h3_edges (resolution, edge_length) VALUES (0, h3EdgeLengthM(0)), (1, h3EdgeLengthM(1)), (2, h3EdgeLengthM(2));
UPDATE h3_edges SET edge_length = h3EdgeLengthM(3) WHERE resolution = 3;
SELECT resolution, edge_length FROM h3_edges WHERE edge_length > 0;
SELECT h3EdgeLengthM(4) AS edgeLengthM, h3EdgeLengthM(5) AS nextEdgeLengthM FROM h3_edges;
